question: Which one of the following cases does not require basic training for UA?

options.text: Users who operate their unmanned aircraft (UA) with a total weight of less than 1.5 kilograms for recreational or educational purpose.
Users who operate their unmanned aircraft (UA) with a total weight of less than 1.5 kilograms for commercial purpose.
Users who operate their unmanned aircraft (UA) with a total weight of more than 7.0 kilograms for recreational or educational purpose.
Users who operate their unmanned aircraft (UA) with a total weight of more than 7.0 kilograms for commercial purpose.
